name: get_weather
description: Return the current weather for a given city. Read-only; performs a single outbound request to a weather provider and returns temperature and conditions. Use when the agent needs current conditions. Do NOT use for forecasts.

name: read_file
description: Read and return the UTF-8 contents of a file at an absolute path. Read-only; no mutation. Use to inspect a known file. Do NOT use on directories.
